title: belvala dodecandra
intro: Belvala dodecandra, also known as Chiraita, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae, native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which are used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Belvala dodecandra include reducing fever, alleviating digestive problems, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Belvala dodecandra include decoctions, infusions, and powdered extracts, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
